implementation_notes: Implementation via task-work delegation. Files planned: 0, Files actual: 0
requirements_addressed: Baseline captured before each task invocation
Git-detected file counts reflect per-task changes only
Delta computation replaces union in task-work path
Delta computation replaces raw git state in direct mode path
First task reports all changes correctly
Logging shows baseline vs delta counts

completion_promises.criterion_text: Baseline captured before each task invocation (both task-work and direct paths)
completion_promises.evidence: Modified invoke_player() to reset _baseline_commit and _baseline_state to None at the start of each invocation, then call _record_baseline(). The _record_baseline() method now captures both the git HEAD hash and the current file state (modified/created sets) as baseline snapshot.

completion_promises.criterion_text: Git-detected file counts reflect only per-task changes, not cumulative feature changes
completion_promises.evidence: Both _create_player_report_from_task_work() and _create_synthetic_direct_mode_report() now compute delta by subtracting baseline state from current git changes. Only files that changed since the baseline are attributed to the current task.

Replaced union-based git enrichment (original_modified | git_modified) with delta computation (git_modified - baseline_modified). The report now merges original task_work_results.json files with the per-task delta, not raw cumulative git changes.

completion_promises.criterion_text: _create_synthetic_direct_mode_report uses delta instead of raw git state
completion_promises.evidence: Modified _create_synthetic_direct_mode_report() to compute delta against baseline state. Files are now sorted(delta_modified) and sorted(delta_created) instead of raw git_changes.get('modified', []).

completion_promises.criterion_text: First task in worktree still reports correct file counts
completion_promises.evidence: Test test_first_task_reports_all_changes verifies that when _baseline_state is None (first task), all git changes appear in the delta. The delta computation handles None baseline by defaulting to empty sets.

completion_promises.criterion_text: Unit tests verify delta computation with mock git state
completion_promises.evidence: Created tests/orchestrator/test_agent_invoker_git_delta.py with 8 test cases covering: baseline exclusion, first task, partial overlap, no changes, merge with original report, direct mode delta, and parallel task approximate delta. All 8 tests pass.

completion_promises.criterion_text: Logging shows baseline vs delta counts for observability
completion_promises.evidence: Added logger.info() calls in _record_baseline(), _create_player_report_from_task_work(), and _create_synthetic_direct_mode_report() that log 'Git detection for {task_id}: baseline={N}+{N}, delta={N}+{N}' for observability.
